name: Ningbo Shuanglin Auto Parts Co.,Ltd.
summary: Ningbo Shuanglin Auto Parts Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells auto parts in China. It offers powertrain solutions, which include automatic transmission systems; permanent magnet synchronous DC motors; and motor, vehicle, and battery control systems. The company also provides hub bearings; automobile accessories, such as interiors and exteriors comprises instrument and door panel, bumper, center control, and vertical column assemblies; and precision injection molding products, including SRS injection molding parts, precision plastic gears, air conditioner parts, fuel system precision injection molding parts, ignition coils, and speakers. In addition, it offers mechanic and electronic devices consist of seat motors, door and window motors, seat drivers, flexible shafts, electronic control modules, and automobile stamping parts, as well as aftersales services. The company was founded in 2010 and is based in Shanghai, China. Ningbo Shuanglin Auto Parts Co.,Ltd. is a subsidiary of Shuanglin Group Co., Ltd.
